paper_title: RefusalBench: Generative Evaluation of Selective Refusal in Grounded Language Models
evaluation_method: Models must either answer or issue a refusal code from 6 categories. Metrics: Refusal Detection F1-Score, Category Accuracy, False Refusal Rate, Missed Refusal Rate, Expected Calibration Error, Calibrated Refusal Score. LLM-as-Judge (Claude Sonnet) scores answer quality 1-5.
metric: Refusal Detection F1, Category Accuracy, CRS
